data.title: China Southern Airlines Announces Key Changes at 2024 AGM
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from China Southern Airlines Company Limited Class H ( (HK:1055) ).

China Southern Airlines held its 2024 Annual General Meeting (AGM) where all proposed resolutions were passed. The meeting saw the resignation of a supervisor, the appointment of a new director and supervisor, and changes in the composition of several committees, including the Audit and Risk Management Committee, Nomination Committee, and Aviation Safety Committee. These changes are expected to impact the company’s governance and operational strategies positively.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1055) stock is a Hold with a HK$4.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Southern Airlines Company Limited Class H stock, see the HK:1055 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Southern Airlines Company Limited Class H

China Southern Airlines Company Limited is a major airline company based in the People’s Republic of China, primarily engaged in providing air transportation services. It operates in the aviation industry, focusing on passenger and cargo air transport services.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$106.8B

data.title: Hofseth BioCare ASA Concludes Successful Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Hofseth Biocare ASA ( (HOFBF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hofseth BioCare ASA successfully held its Annual General Meeting on May 23, 2025, where all proposals were approved. This meeting reinforces the company’s strategic direction and ongoing commitment to innovation in health products derived from salmon by-products, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder interests positively.

More about Hofseth Biocare ASA

Hofseth BioCare ASA is a Norwegian company specializing in consumer and pet health products, focusing on sustainability and the optimal use of natural resources. The company converts salmon industry by-products into health-improving ingredients, such as ProGo®, OmeGo®, and CalGo®, which offer various health benefits. HBC is committed to scientific research, resulting in academic partnerships, patents, and the establishment of a biotech company, HBC Immunology, targeting cancer and asthma therapies.

data.title: Kineta and TuHURA Biosciences Announce Merger Agreement
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Kineta ( (KANT) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

On December 11, 2024, Kineta, Inc. and TuHURA Biosciences, Inc. entered into a merger agreement, which was amended on May 5, 2025. The merger involves TuHURA acquiring Kineta in a cash and stock transaction, with Kineta surviving the merger. Special meetings for stockholders of both companies are scheduled for June 23, 2025, to vote on the merger and related proposals. The merger will result in Kineta stockholders holding approximately 7% of TuHURA’s shares post-merger. Additionally, Kineta has agreed to sell certain assets, including its partnered programs and KCP506 product candidate, to other companies. These transactions are part of the strategic realignment ahead of the merger, impacting the company’s operations and market positioning.

Spark’s Take on KANT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KANT is a Neutral.

Kineta faces financial challenges and lacks profitability, reflected in a low financial performance score. Technical analysis shows no strong trends, and valuation metrics are unappealing due to negative earnings. The recent merger announcement offers a positive outlook, but overall risks weigh heavily.

To see Spark’s full report on KANT stock, click here.

More about Kineta

Kineta, Inc. is a Delaware-based corporation involved in the biopharmaceutical industry. The company focuses on developing innovative therapies, particularly in the area of chronic pain treatment, with products like KCP506. Kineta has also been involved in various partnerships with major pharmaceutical companies such as Merck, Genentech, and FAIR Therapeutics.

Average Trading Volume: 13,228

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.39M

Find detailed analytics on KANT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

McBride ( (GB:MCB) ) has issued an announcement.

McBride PLC, a UK-based company, has announced a change in its voting rights structure due to an acquisition or disposal of shares by DUMAC, Inc., a U.S.-registered entity. The notification indicates that DUMAC’s voting rights in McBride have decreased from 5.9237% to 4.54087%, reflecting a significant shift in shareholder influence. This change may impact McBride’s governance and decision-making processes, potentially affecting its strategic direction and stakeholder relations.

Sanai Health Industry Group Company Limited ( (HK:1889) ) has provided an update.

Sanai Health Industry Group Company Limited has announced that it has lodged a second appeal with the High People’s Court of Beijing regarding a litigation matter. The appeal seeks to have a Finance Lease Agreement and a Guarantee declared invalid and to dismiss the plaintiff’s claims. The company will continue to update shareholders and potential investors on significant developments related to the litigation.

Sanai Health Industry Group Company Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the health industry sector. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on providing health-related products and services.

Dolly Varden Silver ( (TSE:DV) ) has issued an update.

Dolly Varden Silver Corporation announced the completion of its acquisition of the Porter Project on May 23, 2025, from Strikepoint Gold Inc. This acquisition, involving the issuance of 295,699 common shares, enhances Dolly Varden’s position in the Golden Triangle, a region known for its rich mineral deposits. The Porter Project, with its significant exploration potential between two historic silver-rich vein systems, is expected to bolster the company’s exploration capabilities and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DV) stock is a Buy with a C$1.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dolly Varden Silver stock, see the TSE:DV Stock Forecast page.

While corporate events show strategic efforts to improve market positioning, technical analysis suggests a cautious approach given current price trends. Dolly Varden Silver Corporation is a mineral exploration company focused on advancing its 100% held Kitsault Valley Project located in the Golden Triangle of British Columbia, Canada. Honeywell International ( (HON) ) has provided an update.

During its Annual Meeting of Shareowners on May 20, 2025, Honeywell International Inc. elected its board of directors, approved executive compensation, appointed Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent accountants for 2025, and approved a Liability Management Reorganization Proposal. However, a proposal for an Independent Board Chairman was not approved. These decisions reflect the company’s strategic directions and governance priorities, impacting its operational and financial oversight.
